description: Legal document. Dated: Nisan 1456 Seleucid = March/April 1145 CE, under the authority of the Nagid Shemuel b. Ḥananya. Abū l-Maʿānī acknowledges that he has received 20 dinars from Abū l-Faraj and releases him from further claims. The document is unfinished, unsigned, and written in a somewhat rudimentary hand.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
